name: compass
description: Talk to your Compass life OS from Claude. Registers the Compass MCP server (read + propose tools) and end-user skills (morning brief, weekly review, budget check, plan-my-week, web capture). Claude reads your data and proposes changes; every write is approved in Compass's Claude Inbox. Requires a local Compass repo checkout (the MCP runs from it); a self-contained desktop bundle is upcoming (Compass Phase 8.3).
author: Compass contributors
